examples: She tended to blast when speaking into a microphone
The enemy has been shelling us all day

meanings.definition: apply a draft or strong wind to to
examples: the air conditioning was blasting cold air at us
blast a passage through the mountain

meanings.definition: make with or as if with an explosion
examples: blast a tunnel through the Alps
The press savaged the new President
The critics crucified the author for plagiarizing a famous passage

meanings.definition: shrivel or wither or mature imperfectly

examples: I'll be damned (or blessed or darned or goddamned) if I'll do any such thing
he's a damn (or goddam or goddamned) fool
